summary: Docker build failed when trying to download a release artifact from GitHub. The wget command received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error from github.com while attempting to download the nydus release package.
root_cause: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error returned by github.com when wget attempted to download https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz during Docker build step [nydus 1/2]

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Explicit indication that the wget command failed due to a 502 server error from github.com

evidence.quote: ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Shows the build step failed when trying to download the nydus release from GitHub releases
Confirms the connection was established to the server before receiving the 502 error

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job, as HTTP 502 errors are typically transient. If failures persist, verify that the nydus release file (v2.4.0) is still available at https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases or check GitHub's service status.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
